name: mac-design-studio
description: Design beautiful, varied, authentically native macOS app UIs and app icons from scratch — full mock windows (HTML/CSS or token-precise spec) and 1024pt icon designs (SVG or Icon Composer layer spec), each committed to a named aesthetic direction drawn from a catalogue synthesised from 135 curated macapp.supply apps and 134 icons, grounded in Apple's macOS 27 UI kit (control ladder, type ramp, label tiers, chrome metrics) and the HIG. Routes native correctness to the macosify HIG library and craft/variation/polish to design-craft and ux-craft, audits every delivery against a 10-point native-tells audit and 14-point quality rubric, and enforces variety discipline so consecutive designs don't converge to one template. Every design declares one signature element and one justified aesthetic risk (with an AI-default calibration guard on the looks generators overuse), directions are calibration not a closed menu (hybrids and novel directions welcome when the subject earns them), and an incorporated fluid-interface motion layer (springs, interruptibility, materials-on-web, optical typography, reduced-motion floor — from Apple's WWDC design corpus) covers interactive mocks and ships a motion spec with static ones.
